problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: The key to Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? is Shape memory alloy phase transition — specifically Shape memory alloy — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
